title: adonis maculata var. ochroleuca
intro: Adonis maculata var. ochroleuca, also known as the White Adonis or Ochroleuca, is a variant of the Adonis maculata plant, a perennial species in the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce pain and swelling, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Traditionally, Adonis maculata var. ochroleuca is prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
